headline: Fed Meeting, PPI, Micron Earnings: Still to Come This Week
summary: The Federal Reserve's interest-rate decision dominates this week's calendar. Investors will also closely monitor February’s producer-price index for inflation signals, alongside a corporate earnings slate featuring Micron, Lululemon and FedEx.

raw.headline: Fed Meeting, PPI, Micron Earnings: Still to Come This Week

headline: Here's What Investors Must Know Ahead of Williams-Sonoma's Q4 Earnings
summary: WSM heads into Q4 earnings with estimates pointing to lower sales and profits as tariff pressures, weak housing turnover and cautious spending weigh on demand.
